selection.scope: Technology-spike recommendation only; production readiness is not established.
selection.release_requirement: Palai must mirror this exact index and sign the mirrored artifact before the E18 release gate.

readiness.command: GET /readyz process hint followed by an authenticated ListBuckets request
readiness.semantics: The /readyz handler alone is not proof of S3/auth readiness; the signed S3 request must also succeed.

offline.export_command: docker image save exact selected platform image to a mode-0600 archive
offline.import_command: run the Palai image-load CLI in a network-none container and stream the archive to the local Docker Engine image-load API
offline.claim: Local archive round-trip only; cached daemon layers may remain and a cold empty-daemon air-gap install is deferred to E18.

supply_chain.status: No signature, attestation, or SBOM was discoverable for the exact index by the scoped checks.
supply_chain.check_method: Standard OCI referrers API plus recognized Cosign legacy artifact-tag conventions; this is not a claim of absolute absence.

distribution.policy_concern: Palai mirror and signature required before release distribution.

maintenance.status: v2.3.0 released 2026-04-16 and remains the current stable release

readiness.semantics: HTTP 200 when the node can connect to enough nodes for quorum; HTTP 503 otherwise.

s3_conformance.command: scripts/spikes/object-store evidence with the candidate endpoint injected

offline.export_command: docker image save exact selected platform image to a mode-0600 archive
offline.import_command: docker image load from the local archive
offline.claim: OCI local archive export/import path is available.

supply_chain.status: No signature, attestation, or SBOM was discoverable for the exact index by the scoped checks.
supply_chain.check_method: Standard OCI referrers API plus recognized Cosign legacy artifact-tag conventions; this is not a claim of absolute absence.

distribution.policy_concern: AGPL-3.0 distribution-policy review is required; no legal compatibility conclusion is made by this spike.

maintenance.status: Repository archived 2026-04-25; latest community release is source-only and the remaining official image lags the source release.

readiness.semantics: HTTP success indicates the legacy server is ready to accept requests; this does not change the archived/source-only eligibility result.

s3_conformance.command: scripts/spikes/object-store evidence with the candidate endpoint injected

offline.export_command: docker image save the historical exact platform image to a mode-0600 archive
offline.import_command: docker image load from the local archive
offline.claim: Historical image local archive path only; current community distribution is source-only.

supply_chain.status: No OCI signature, attestation, or SBOM was discoverable for the historical exact index by the scoped checks.
supply_chain.check_method: Standard OCI referrers API plus recognized Cosign legacy artifact-tag conventions; source-tag signing is not OCI image signature verification.

distribution.policy_concern: Rejected as the default because upstream is archived/source-only and the official image lags; not rejected for S3 API maturity.
